calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-28-2019 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2018 Set For Trial On Mar-04-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-23-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Michael J. Fedalen of the HFL Law Group, Inc., Tel. No. 1-818-377-9000 appearing
for the Plaintiff;
Atty. Jeffrey R. Loew of the Loew Law Group, Tel. No. 1-650-397-8700 appearing for
the Defendants.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendants Julie and Robert Almeida's demurrer to all six causes of action in the complaint filed by plaintiff Ellyn Weiss is overruled as to all six causes of action. (See word minute for details) Answer to be filed by June 8, 2018. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/hk

Defendant Julie Almeida, Robert Almeida Demurrer To Complaint (For Tentative Ruling Purposes Only) (Part 2 Of 2)
Off Calendar May-23-2018 Off Calendar
